prompt:
A submersible 150 W aquarium heater is shown attached vertically to the inside glass of a medium-sized tank using suction cups, its slim cylindrical body partially covered by a protective plastic guard. A small adjustable thermostat dial sits near the top of the heater, and a temperature scale is visible but too small to read, suggesting a 20–30 °C range. The power cord exits the waterline and drapes neatly over the back rim toward a nearby outlet.

The scene is a near-future solarpunk aquarium corner with soft, even lighting, live plants and fish in the tank, and a stick-on thermometer strip on the outside glass in the blurred background. The 512×512 image is photorealistic with gentle stylization, no logos or readable text on the heater or equipment, and a composition that centers the heater, its mounting, and the warmed tank environment while the rest of the room remains softly out of focus, emphasizing reliable temperature control for a 150 L aquarium.
